title: Houseki
description: A mod that adds new ores and things that try to replicate their real-life counterparts!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a53b951dccf70440f1bfd85a086586f9a12ed47.png)

---

Houseki, pronounced (Hoe-sec-E), is a mod that focuses on the realism of stones/rocks, gems, crystals, and metals, and aims to replicate the real-life counterparts of the items added! The mod features many new ores, tools, and armor, along with full armor set effects!

---
## Don't see the item you want in the mod?
Check out the [Suggestion Box](https://whispermeter.com/feedback/housekidev) and suggest what you want! Or just leave feedback, up to you!

**!!Remember, your suggestion must be a real thing with real uses!!**

You can also check the [Development Board](https://trello.com/b/gkn3qGlL/houseki-development) to see if your suggestion is being worked on or not!

![The Stuffs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a9cd1724c26846c6fec777883b8102246061170.png)


This mod requires the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) to work!

## Don't forget to check out the Wiki for help!

---
| Ore & Materials   | Location                     | Equivalent          | Full Set Bonus    |
|-------------------|:----------------------------:|:-------------------:|------------------:|
| **Pinku**         | The End                      | Way Above Netherite | N/A               |
| **Rainbow Pyrite**| Coal, Bauxite, and Sandstone | Iron                | Luck II           |
| **Wolframite**    | Granite Deposits             | N/A                 | N/A               |
| **Scheelite**     | Nether up to Y 64            | N/A                 | N/A               |
| **Tugsten**       | Crafting                     | Netherite           | Fire Resistance V |
| **Sapphire**      | Overworld Y < 30             | Diamond             | Resistance V      |
| **Aluminum**      | Smelting/Blasting            | Iron                | N/A               |
| **Jadite**        | Slate Deposits               | Netherite           | Regeneration II   |
| **Nephrite**      | Limestone Deposits           | Diamond             | Regeneration      |
| **Platinum**      | Copper Viens and Meteorites  | Netherite           | Absorption II     |
| **Crude Iron**    | Blasting                     | N/A                 | N/A               |
| **Steel**         | Blasting                     | N/A                 | N/A               |
| **Cast Steel**    | Casting                      | Better than Diamond | Strength II       |
| **Nickel Powder** | Crushing                     | N/A                 | N/A               |
| **Meteoric Iron** | Meteorites                   | Close to Netherite  | Saturation        |
| **Bismuth**       | Overworld above Deepslate    | N/A                 | N/A               |
| **Sugilite**      | Nether up to Y 11            | N/A                 | N/A               |
| **Sulfur**        | Netherack and Blackstone     | N/A                 | N/A               |

---

## Two New Block Entities!

The **Crusher** and the **Foundry**

---

### Rock Deposits

| Rocks        | Location                  | Building Blocks? |
|--------------|:-------------------------:|:----------------:|
| **Limestone**| Specific Overworld Biomes | ✅              |
| **Slate**    | Overworld                 | ✅              |
| **Bauxite**  | Specific Overworld Biomes | ❌              |

---

### Drills

| Tier         | Mining Box | Mineable Blocks    |
|--------------|:----------:|:------------------:|
| **Simple**   | 1x1        | Pickaxe            |
| **Enhanced** | 3x3        | Pickaxe/Shovel     |
| **Advanced** | 5x5        | Pickaxe            |
| **Premium**  | 5x5        | Pickaxe/Shovel/Axe |

---

**Version format:** _Content Updates_._Bug Fixes/Minor Updates_._Update MC Versions_+**Minecraft Version**
(ex: 1.1.1-1.21.3)

Please refer to the license for usage in Modpacks and other things. Thank you!


This is my first mod and attempt at pixel art. So I do apologize for any problems and bad artwork.
